name: libregexp-pattern-license-perl
title: libregexp-pattern-license-perl
description:
regular expressions for legal licenses
Regexp::Pattern::License provides a hash of regular expression patterns
related to legal software licenses.
.
Regexp::Pattern is a convention for organizing reusable regex patterns.
